Here is the cleaned and organized repository list. I have grouped them by function and integrated the descriptions found in your document for a complete reference.Core Projects & Rebuilds
dbrownla5/well-lived-citizen: A modern household stewardship company in Los Angeles. Thoughtful stewardship for the realities modern households quietly carry. Built with Manus.
dbrownla5/well-lived-citizen-manus: Development repository for Manus-based stewardship tools.
dbrownla5/well-lived-citizen-site: Migration of the existing The Well Lived Citizen marketing site from Replit to a server-controlled deployment, including a business-info API and a minimal brand interface.
dbrownla5/well-lived-citizenV.5.13: Concierge home and life services for people in transition—home organization, legacy planning, house calls, and curated resale.
dbrownla5/the-well-lived-citizen-rebuild: (See also: wlc-build-2026) The Well Lived Citizen — clean build 2 26. React/Vite site + Netlify serverless CRM.
dbrownla5/Well_Livedv5.1: Active project versioning.
dbrownla5/wlc-build-2026: Recent build iteration.
dbrownla5/wlc-june-2026: June 2026 iteration of the WLC project.
dbrownla5/wlc-portal: The Well Lived Citizen — client consignment portal (static site, talks to Supabase).
dbrownla5/WEBREBUILD: Primary web infrastructure rebuild.
dbrownla5/WEB-BUILD-REPLIT: Legacy/Platform-specific build environment.
dbrownla5/Rebuild: General rebuild repository.
dbrownla5/ReplitFinal: Active state as of 5.29.
dbrownla5/Resell-Google-App-v5.3.2-26: Resell platform application (v5.3.2).
Operations, Dashboards & Business
dbrownla5/handshake-dashboard: Dashboard to manage the 9-step Handshake workflow. Connects to Google Sheets as a database and allows tracking each client's progress.
dbrownla5/Dashboard-: General operational dashboard.
dbrownla5/BUSINESS-AGENT: Business-focused automation agent.
dbrownla5/Business-hub: Centralized business management hub.
dbrownla5/Visual-Brand: Brand asset management.
dbrownla5/Visual-Brand-Boost: Repository for managing visual branding boosts.
dbrownla5/SHIPWEIGHT: Logistics and weight tracking repository.
dbrownla5/SH: Short-hand operational repo.
dbrownla5/Vault: Secure storage/reference repository.
dbrownla5/offload: Data or task offloading utility.
dbrownla5/antigravity_phone_chat: Real-time mobile monitor & remote control for Antigravity AI sessions (CDP-based).
dbrownla5/Studio-content-: Content management for studio operations.
dbrownla5/team-project-build: Collaborative build environment.
Tools & Development
dbrownla5/repo-digest: Transform any code repository into an AI-ready text bundle.
dbrownla5/Content-Extractor: Specialized content processing tool.
dbrownla5/nextjs-boilerplate: Standardized Next.js template.
dbrownla5/vercel-ai-gateway-demo: Demonstration repository for Vercel AI gateway integration.
dbrownla5/skills: "Skills for Real Engineers"—engineering knowledge base from .claude directory.
dbrownla5/solid-couscous: Experimental or utility development.
dbrownla5/May24: Historical archive (May 2024).
